arts.ttl: Preview: Shrewsbury Town vs. Wigan Athletic - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Friday's League One clash between Shrewsbury Town and Wigan Athletic, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Michael Appleton explains Shrewsbury Town advice as relegation looms
arts.sum: But when that went away around December time, I had to have a little bit of a think. "That was there for about six months, and I always thought I was going into something a little bit different.

arts.ttl: Wigan Athletic chief responds to transfer talk regarding Stoke City striker shining at Blackpool who he worked with at Plymouth Argyle
arts.sum: Ryan Lowe admitted the 'phone's started ringing already' with regards to Wigan Athletic's recruitment plans for this summer.

arts.ttl: Wigan Athletic head coach makes Liverpool loanee revelation
arts.sum: Luke Chambers has returned to Liverpool to be treated after suffering a recurrence of the back injury that has cut short his second spell at Wigan Athletic.

arts.ttl: Wigan Athletic head coach on 'bigger challenge' ahead - and not letting season 'peter out'
arts.sum: Ryan Lowe believes the Good Friday trip to League One's rock-bottom club Shrewsbury Town will be 'a bigger challenge' for Wigan Athletic than last weekend's visit of automatic promotion favourites Wrexham.
